scripts.dev: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio && concurrently --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "cd backend && uv run uvicorn api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload" "cd frontend && pnpm dev"
scripts.dev:services: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
